overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) exploring a dystopian urban canyon. The player walks through a narrow street lined with abandoned vehicles, massive red steel structural frameworks, and towering residential buildings under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street corner with wrecked vehicles

events.description: moving from the open corner into the narrow street lined with wrecked vehicles and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the debris-filled street, navigating between abandoned cars and rubble

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screen displaying 'DELAMAIN' logo and luxury vehicle image on the blue building
tall blue residential building with external air conditioning units and fire escapes
massive red industrial steel structural beams forming an overhead bridge framework
abandoned green sedan with open doors, debris inside, and overgrown weeds around tires
abandoned red sports car with rust damage and missing wheels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city corner dominated by a large Delamain digital billboard on a blue apartment building. The camera moves forward through a narrow street littered with abandoned vehicles, including a prominent green sedan and red sports car, approaching a massive red steel structural framework ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial steel canyon with overhead structural beams

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing crosses the street from right to left in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon formed by red steel beams, approaching a distant pedestrian crossing the road

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left beneath the steel framework

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large green industrial waste containers lined against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the massive red steel framework that now dominates the overhead view, creating an industrial canyon effect. Graffiti-covered concrete walls and green dumpsters line the left side. A lone pedestrian crosses the street ahead, the only human presence in this abandoned sector.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vending machines approaching residential tower

events.description: exiting the red steel canyon into a slightly wider commercial street with illuminated storefronts
passing a pedestrian in an orange tank top walking toward the camera on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive glass tower at the end of the street, passing vending machines and a pedestrian on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange tank top and hat walking toward the camera on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial storefront with yellow trim and illuminated advertisement posters in glass cases
row of colorful vending machines including red and blue units against the building wall
massive cylindrical glass and concrete residential tower with external staircases filling the street end

segments.scene_description: Exiting the steel canyon, the street opens slightly to reveal commercial storefronts with yellow trim and glowing advertisements. Colorful vending machines line the right wall. The camera approaches a massive cylindrical glass tower that dominates the end of the street, while a pedestrian in an orange tank top walks toward the camera on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban canyon that transitions from a cluttered street corner into a towering industrial corridor and finally opens toward a futuristic glass spire. It begins at a city corner beneath a large Delamain digital billboard, moving forward past abandoned green and red vehicles toward a massive red steel structural framework. As the camera passes beneath this framework, the environment shifts into a claustrophobic industrial canyon defined by overhead steel, graffiti-covered concrete walls, and a lone pedestrian crossing the empty street. The scene then expands as the camera exits the steel structure, revealing commercial storefronts with yellow trim and colorful vending machines. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a massive cylindrical glass tower dominating the horizon while another pedestrian in an orange tank top approaches from the left.
